name: validator-runs-clean
assertion: node .agent/skills/skill-creator/scripts/validate-skills.mjs exits 0 across the whole skills directory

name: scaffolder-output-fails-validation
assertion: A freshly scaffolded skill (create-skill.mjs output, untouched) is flagged with errors by validate-skills.mjs — the scaffold must never pass as a finished skill

name: scaffolder-wires-gitignore-and-symlink
assertion: create-skill.mjs appends the !.agent/skills/<name>/ allowlist line to .gitignore and creates the .claude/skills/<name> symlink

name: no-ghost-references
assertion: Every script, hook, and file path referenced anywhere in this skill exists and parses (node --check / bash -n)

name: hook-is-installable
assertion: hooks/pre-commit-validate.sh's header install snippet works verbatim from the repo root and the hook exits 0 when no skill files are staged
